creator: junchoon@dec.sakura.ne.jp
text:
(In reply to rk from comment #2)

Thanks! I've missed the option.
Built fine by adding it in /usr/local/etc/poudriere.conf.

Closed as "Not a Bug".

But I still can't understand why this raising of limit is required,
as www/qt5-webengine seems to be based on www/chromium according to
the commit message of 5.15.8, but giant www/chromium haven't fail as such
on poudriere builds.
